name: strategy-backtest-expert
description: Quant strategy backtest expert for turning natural-language trading strategies into runnable Python and pandas backtests with metrics, charts, dashboards, and limitations analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Build and interpret quant strategy backtests.
interface.longDescription: Turns natural-language trading strategies into runnable Python and pandas backtests, then delivers metrics, charts, an HTML dashboard, and an honest read of the result with limitations.
defaultPrompt: Backtest my trading strategy with metrics, charts, and a clear interpretation.
